name: playwright-captcha
desc: Automating captcha solving for Playwright. Supports Cloudflare Turnstile & Interstitial, and reCAPTCHA V2 & V3 with Click-based or API (2captcha) solving. Desi…
descFull: Automating captcha solving for Playwright. Supports Cloudflare Turnstile & Interstitial, and reCAPTCHA V2 & V3 with Click-based or API (2captcha) solving. Designed for easy integration with Playwright, Patchright, and Camoufox.
